zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Bruce於大約1096年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Sir Robert De Bruce36歲，母親Agnes Waltheg33歲。他和Agnes Amund至少有1個兒子。他去世於1143年享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Bruce was born about 1096, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert De Bruce, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Waltheg, was 33. He had at least 1 son with Agnes Amund. He died in 1143, at the age of 48.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Bruce è nato il circa 1096 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Bruce, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Waltheg, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes Amund. Morì nel 1143, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruceが約1096年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruceは36歳，母Agnes Walthegは33歳であった。彼はAgnes Amundとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1143年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruce(이)가 대략 1096년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Waltheg(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Agnes Amund(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1143년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
